burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to chronic symptoms and functional impairment
burden.mortalityRate: Low (indirect via comorbidity and suicide risk)

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Persistent excessive worry for >6 months with functional impairment; DSM-5 criteria

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to psychotherapy and SSRIs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with standardized screening tools
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT and SSRIs/SNRIs; lifestyle interventions; avoid long-term benzodiazepines
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access gaps to psychotherapy in some countries
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Structured mental health services and evidence-based guidelines
